languages.text: "Моя основная задача — врачевать плоть, Лорд-капитан. Я заведую процессами, связанными с работой тела, а в случае с аугментами — тем, насколько правильно они соединены с плотью. Можно сказать, я делаю так, чтобы священный для {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Омниссии{/g} металл стал истинным продолжением живого тела". {n}Хирургеон гордо поднимает подбородок.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Моя основная задача — врачевать плоть, Лорд-капитан. Я заведую процессами, связанными с работой тела, а в случае с аугментами — тем, насколько правильно они соединены с плотью. Можно сказать, я делаю так, чтобы священный для {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Омниссии{/g} металл стал истинным продолжением живого тела". {n}Хирургеон гордо поднимает подбородок.{/n}

languages.text: "My primary task is to heal the flesh, Lord Captain. I oversee the processes involved in the workings of the body, and in the case of augments, how well they are joined to the flesh. You might say I make sure that the metal sacred to the {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g} becomes a true extension of the living body." {n}The chirurgeon raises his chin proudly.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Моя основная задача — врачевать плоть, Лорд-капитан. Я заведую процессами, связанными с работой тела, а в случае с аугментами — тем, насколько правильно они соединены с плотью. Можно сказать, я делаю так, чтобы священный для {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Омниссии{/g} металл стал истинным продолжением живого тела". {n}Хирургеон гордо поднимает подбородок.{/n}

You might say I make sure that the metal sacred to the {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g} becomes a true extension of the living body." {n}The chirurgeon raises his chin proudly.{/n}

You might say I make sure that the metal sacred to the Omnissiah becomes a true extension of the living body." {n}The chirurgeon raises his chin proudly.{/n}

"My primary task is to heal the flesh, Lord Captain. I oversee the processes involved in the workings of the body, and in the case of augments, how well they are joined to the flesh. You might say I make sure that the metal sacred to the Omnissiah becomes a true extension of the living body." {n}The chirurgeon raises his chin proudly.{/n}

languages.text: 「私の主な任務は肉体の治癒です、艦長。私は身体の機能に関わるプロセスを監督し、増幅器の装着は肉体への結合の具合を監督します。オムニシアの聖なる金属が真の生体の一部となるように、私は確認しているのです」{n}外科医は誇らしげに顎を上げる。{/n}
languages.original_text: "My primary task is to heal the flesh, Lord Captain. I oversee the processes involved in the workings of the body, and in the case of augments, how well they are joined to the flesh. You might say I make sure that the metal sacred to the Omnissiah becomes a true extension of the living body." {n}The chirurgeon raises his chin proudly.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 「私の主な任務は肉体の治癒です、艦長。私は身体の機能に関わるプロセスを監督し、増幅器の装着は肉体への結合の具合を監督します。オムニシアの聖なる金属が真の生体の一部となるように、私は確認しているのです。」{n}外科医は誇らしげに顎を上げる。{/n}

languages.text: "Birincil vazifem eti iyileştirmektir Lord Kaptan. Vücudun işleyişinde yer alan süreçleri ve ogmentlerin etle ne kadar iyi birleştiğini denetliyorum. {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Hermesih{/g} için kutsal olan metalin, yaşayan bedenin gerçek bir uzantısı hâline gelmesini sağlıyorum diyebiliriz." {n}Cerrah, çenesini gururla kaldırıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "My primary task is to heal the flesh, Lord Captain. I oversee the processes involved in the workings of the body, and in the case of augments, how well they are joined to the flesh. You might say I make sure that the metal sacred to the {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g} becomes a true extension of the living body." {n}The chirurgeon raises his chin proudly.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Birincil vazifem eti iyileştirmektir Lord Kaptan. Vücudun işleyişinde yer alan süreçleri ve ogmentlerin etle ne kadar iyi birleştiğini denetliyorum. Hermesih için kutsal olan metalin, yaşayan bedenin gerçek bir uzantısı hâline gelmesini sağlıyorum diyebiliriz." {n}Cerrah, çenesini gururla kaldırıyor.{/n}

languages.text: «Mi tarea principal es curar la carne, Lord Capitán. Superviso los procesos involucrados en el funcionamiento del cuerpo y, en el caso de los aumentos, comprobar lo bien unidos que están con la carne. Podría decirse que me aseguro de que el metal sagrado del {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g} se convierte en una auténtica extensión del cuerpo». {n}El cirujano levanta la barbilla con orgullo.{/n}
languages.original_text: "My primary task is to heal the flesh, Lord Captain. I oversee the processes involved in the workings of the body, and in the case of augments, how well they are joined to the flesh. You might say I make sure that the metal sacred to the {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g} becomes a true extension of the living body." {n}The chirurgeon raises his chin proudly.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «Mi tarea principal es curar la carne, Lord Capitán. Superviso los procesos involucrados en el funcionamiento del cuerpo y, en el caso de los aumentos, comprobar lo bien unidos que están con la carne. Podría decirse que me aseguro de que el metal sagrado del Omnissiah se convierte en una auténtica extensión del cuerpo». {n}El cirujano levanta la barbilla con orgullo.{/n}

languages.text: “我的首要任务是治愈血肉，舰长大人。我监管一切和身体运作相关的进程。至于植入物方面，我也负责监察它们与血肉的结合情况。您可以说，我是在确保{g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}欧姆尼赛亚{/g}的神圣金属能真正成为活体躯干的延伸。”{n}船医骄傲地扬起了下巴。{/n}
languages.original_text: "My primary task is to heal the flesh, Lord Captain. I oversee the processes involved in the workings of the body, and in the case of augments, how well they are joined to the flesh. You might say I make sure that the metal sacred to the {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g} becomes a true extension of the living body." {n}The chirurgeon raises his chin proudly.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “我的首要任务是治愈血肉，舰长大人。我监管一切和身体运作相关的进程。至于植入物方面，我也负责监察它们与血肉的结合情况。您可以说，我是在确保欧姆尼赛亚的神圣金属能真正成为活体躯干的延伸。”{n}船医骄傲地扬起了下巴。{/n}

languages.text: « Ma tâche principale consiste à soigner la chair, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}. Je supervise les processus liés au fonctionnement du corps et, dans le cas des augmentations, je vérifie si elles ont été correctement soudées à la chair. On pourrait dire que je veille à ce que le métal sacré de l'{g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnimessie{/g} devienne une véritable extension du corps vivant, » {n}explique le chirurgeon en relevant fièrement le menton.{/n}
languages.original_text: "My primary task is to heal the flesh, Lord Captain. I oversee the processes involved in the workings of the body, and in the case of augments, how well they are joined to the flesh. You might say I make sure that the metal sacred to the {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g} becomes a true extension of the living body." {n}The chirurgeon raises his chin proudly.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Ma tâche principale consiste à soigner la chair, {mf|seigneur-capitaine|seigneure-capitaine}. Je supervise les processus liés au fonctionnement du corps et, dans le cas des augmentations, je vérifie si elles ont été correctement soudées à la chair. On pourrait dire que je veille à ce que le métal sacré de l'Omnimessie devienne une véritable extension du corps vivant, » {n}explique le chirurgeon en relevant fièrement le menton.{/n}

languages.text: "Meine Hauptaufgabe besteht darin, das Fleisch zu heilen, Lord Captain. Ich überwache die Prozesse der Körperfunktionen und kümmere mich bei Augmentationen darum, wie gut sie sich mit dem Fleisch verbinden. Man könnte sagen, ich sorge dafür, dass das dem {g|Encyclopedia:OmnissiahGlossary}Omnissiah{/g} heilige Metall eine wahrhaftige Erweiterung des lebenden Körpers wird." {n}Der Chirurgeum hebt stolz sein Kinn.{/n}
